channel.title: Game Design on Pippin Barr
channel.description: Recent content in Game Design on Pippin Barr

item.title: GAME IDEAS
item.description:
Here are a lot of game ideas I used to post to Twitter back in 2015-2018.

░ GAME IDEA
░ ░ DO A THING IN A LUSH
░ ░ ░ BEAUTIFUL WORLD
░ ░
░

░ GAME IDEA
░ ░ YOU GET OLD
░ ░ ░ AND YOU KEEP
░ ░ ░ ░ GETTING OLDER

░
░ ░ GAME IDEA
░ ░ ░
░ ░ ░ ░ MILLIONS OF PEOPLE
░ ░ ░ ░ ░ HAPPY
░ ░ ░ ░ ░ ░
